date_from.description: ISO-8601 inclusive lower bound on `created_at`. Omit to skip the lower bound.

date_to.description: ISO-8601 exclusive upper bound on `created_at`. Pass to walk back past the result cap on subsequent calls (cursor-style: set to the `created_at` of the oldest run from the prior page).

emitted.description: Filter by emit outcome. `true` returns only runs that emitted at least one finding (`emitted_count > 0`); `false` returns only runs that emitted nothing. Omit for both.

limit.description: Max rows to return (default 20, hard cap 100).

skill_name.description: Exact-match filter on the scout skill (e.g. `signals-scout-errors`). Narrows the run dump to a single scout — the primary scoping path when a specialist dedupes against its own past runs. Omit to span every scout on the team.

skill_version.description: Exact-match filter on the skill version. Pair with `skill_name` to pin one version; omit for all.

text.description: Case-insensitive substring match on the scout's end-of-run `summary`. Omit to skip the filter.
